message:
feat: Implement TODO stubs in regex, tokenizer/pyregex, and c_interop

- packages/regex/src: All 10 TODOs implemented
  - parser.zig: Added hex/unicode/octal escapes (\xHH, \uHHHH, \NNN),
    proper empty expression handling, better metacharacter errors
  - nfa.zig: Implemented \D, \w, \W, \S character class NFA compilation
    with proper range transitions, capture group tracking for groups
  - ast.zig: Added empty expression variant for epsilon matches
  - ast_optimizer.zig: Context-aware non-capturing group optimization
  - main.zig: Updated output message (removed TODO.md reference)

- packages/tokenizer/src/pyregex: Same 8 fixes applied to duplicate copy
  - Parallel implementation to packages/regex for consistency

- packages/c_interop/c_interop.zig: 2 TODOs implemented
  - PyErr_SetString: Thread-local exception state with type/value storage
  - PyErr_Occurred/Clear: Proper exception state checking and clearing
  - toPyObject array conversion: Full PyList creation and population
  - Added PyList_New, PyList_SetItem, PyList_Type initialization
